migration_policy: additive until 1.x; breaking changes require migration note, fixture update, backwards-compatibility decision, explicit reviewer approval
title: CC fact card
description: One provenance-backed, reviewed claim. Cards are immutable reviewed content: learner scheduling state (confidence, missed count, next review date) never lives here. Enforced from PR-3 by the copy-adapted cc_spine factstore validator.

fact_id.description: Globally unique; never silently reused for a different claim. Deprecation requires a tombstone with deprecated_by/deprecation_reason and an explicit replacement fact_id.

status.description: Only active cards may ground live bank items.

source_fingerprint.description: Drift detection: validation fails if the live source no longer matches.

support.description: Support-span limits (source-policy.md): structured JSON = exact field value only; markdown ≤ one heading excerpt or 50 words; transcript ≤ 25 words unless explicitly authorized. Never a full practice question, answer key, or long lecture passage.

notes.bank_eligibility: mnemonic -> definition_recall only; exam_trap -> concept_discrimination; numeric_fact -> definition_recall, exam_strategy. Full matrix lives in spine/banks/banks.json.
notes.mnemonic_rule: mnemonic cards are study aids and are never assessable.
